title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Trust, Message Framing, and Smuggling Defense · Contract Triage
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model; retain the failing request and response, isolate the first causal server boundary, and keep a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence def…
objectives: Trace downstream and upstream connections, hop-by-hop versus end-to-end fields, termination points, authority, scheme, client address, and failure ownership.
Use ReverseProxy.Rewrite with separate inbound and outbound requests, SetURL and reviewed SetXForwarded behavior, and reject deprecated Director trust assumptions.
Strip untrusted forwarding fields, rebuild them only at trusted hops, constrain backend targets, remove hop-by-hop state, and prevent header spoofing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Inspect the failure record · Debug Proxy Hop Origin Model
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug team handles case 9822 in a public status API serving assistive and low-bandwidth clients. Build deterministic Go evidence to reject ambiguous framing and deprecated Director-style proxy mutation; then lower the byte or time budget and prove rejection occurs at the owning boundary. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
